title: Alex Walmsley
description: GB & England international rugby league footballer
extract:
Alex Walmsley (born 10 April 1990) is an English professional rugby league footballer who plays as a prop for St Helens in the Super League, and England and Great Britain at international level.
He previously played for the Batley Bulldogs in the Championship and has spent time on loan from Saints at his former club in the second tier.
